root_cause_measured.defect: NOT an engine defect -- a measurer notation gap. The 2 R4x resistant pairs (def X-FORM_청주$0$dA로고, 1BDF/762B + 1BE6/7632) are ASSOCIATIVE hatches (1 boundary source entity per loop, is_associative=true both sides): AcDbHatch::evaluateHatch re-derives the loop payload from the sources and RE-FITS the spline chain -- census carries multi-span cubic B-spline edges (knots 23/8/14), the rebuild carries per-span Bezier edges (10-vs-9 spans on loop0 after algebraic normalization, max curve deviation 9.16e-4 measured by de Casteljau nearest-neighbour sampling of the part-1 canonical chains; the same figure the R4x point-cloud proxy reported).

part 1 (algebraic Boehm split to Bezier chain, 6dp emission, closed-cycle rotation) is identity-preserving: independent de Boor/de Casteljau oracle holds every sampled point within 1e-9 on the hand cubic, the rational quarter-circle, and both resistant a-side loops
sourceless all-spline loops (29-14=15 per side) keep their full part-1 chain -- fingerprint sharpness for authored spline boundaries is unchanged (1e-3 perturbation still detected, unit test)

measurement_contract.rule: LEX-0013: segmentation and knot parameterization of a spline edge chain are notation (part 1); the evaluateHatch-derived, re-fit spline-chain cache of an assoc-SOURCED loop is notation whose authored truth lives in the source entities, compared exactly in the same def diff (part 2, LEX-0011/LEX-0001 precedent). Blind spot documented: a cache difference with identical sources is host-deterministic re-derivation, exactly the quotiented notation; real boundary changes move the sources.
